mapper.select:
SELECT c.id AS class_id, c.name AS class_name, cr.name AS course_name, rm.name AS classroom_name, c.planned_student_count AS planned_student_count, COUNT(cs.student_id) AS student_count FROM class_student cs INNER JOIN class c ON cs.class_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN course cr ON c.course_id = cr.id AND cr.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN classroom rm ON c.classroom_id = rm.id AND rm.deleted = 0 WHERE cs.student_id = #{studentId} AND cs.deleted = 0
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{className}, '%')
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, cr.name, rm.name, c.planned_student_count ORDER BY MAX(cs.add_time) DESC
SELECT id, class_id, student_id, deleted FROM class_student WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND student_id = #{studentId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
